creator: gibbs@scsiguy.com
text:
>>Synopsis:       does not like scsi on atrend 6260 dual PIII  (adaptec 7880)

Can you give some additional information about this system - MB chipset,
processor speed, PCI layout (pciconf -l output), etc?  Can you drop into
the debugger on this system when the hang occurs?  If you wait for several
minutes, are any messages printed?  Is there a version of FreeBSD that
does work on this system?

--
Justin
